claims.text: The agent achieved a success rate of over 90% in simulation.
claims.source_quote: Experimental results demonstrate that the agent achieved a success rate of over 90% in simulation.

claims.text: The paper uses the Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) algorithm to develop a 6-DoF control policy.
claims.source_quote: Using the Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) algorithm, we developed a 6-DoF control policy trained in a headless environment with randomized starting positions to ensure generalized performance.

claims.text: The Stonefish simulator was adapted into a multiprocessing RL framework.
claims.source_quote: We adapted the Stonefish simulator into a multiprocessing RL framework to significantly accelerate the learning process while incorporating realistic AUV dynamics, collision models, and sensor noise.

claims.text: The multiprocessing RL framework significantly accelerates the learning process.
claims.source_quote: We adapted the Stonefish simulator into a multiprocessing RL framework to significantly accelerate the learning process while incorporating realistic AUV dynamics, collision models, and sensor noise.

claims.text: The Stonefish simulator incorporates realistic AUV dynamics, collision models, and sensor noise.
claims.source_quote: We adapted the Stonefish simulator into a multiprocessing RL framework to significantly accelerate the learning process while incorporating realistic AUV dynamics, collision models, and sensor noise.

claims.text: The DRL policy was trained in a headless environment with randomized starting positions.
claims.source_quote: we developed a 6-DoF control policy trained in a headless environment with randomized starting positions to ensure generalized performance.

claims.text: The reward structure accounts for distance, orientation, action smoothness, and adaptive collision penalties.
claims.source_quote: Our reward structure accounts for distance, orientation, action smoothness, and adaptive collision penalties to facilitate soft docking.

claims.text: The DRL controller was successfully validated in a physical test tank.
claims.source_quote: Furthermore, successful validation in a physical test tank confirmed the efficacy of the sim-to-reality adaptation

claims.text: The DRL controller exhibited pitch-based braking as an emergent behavior.
claims.source_quote: with the DRL controller exhibiting emergent behaviors such as pitch-based braking and yaw oscillations to assist in mechanical alignment.

claims.text: The DRL controller exhibited yaw oscillations as an emergent behavior to assist in mechanical alignment.
claims.source_quote: with the DRL controller exhibiting emergent behaviors such as pitch-based braking and yaw oscillations to assist in mechanical alignment.

claims.text: The autonomous underwater docking system uses the Girona Autonomous Underwater Vehicle (AUV).
claims.source_quote: This paper presents a systematic approach for autonomous docking using the Girona Autonomous Underwater Vehicle (AUV) by leveraging a high-fidelity digital twin environment.

claims.text: A high-fidelity digital twin environment was used for training the docking policy.
claims.source_quote: This paper presents a systematic approach for autonomous docking using the Girona Autonomous Underwater Vehicle (AUV) by leveraging a high-fidelity digital twin environment.

claims.text: Bridging the sim-to-real gap and managing high training latencies are significant bottlenecks for practical deployment of DRL in underwater docking.
claims.source_quote: However, bridging the "sim-to-real" gap and managing high training latencies remain significant bottlenecks for practical deployment.

claims.text: Deep Reinforcement Learning offers an alternative to traditional control methods for autonomous underwater docking.
claims.source_quote: Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) offers a robust alternative to traditional control methods for autonomous underwater docking, particularly in adapting to unpredictable environmental conditions.
